properties.text:
Thunderstorm with Frequent lightning activity, seems to be strengthening.
Still doesnt have the parameters for a Severe Thunderstorm Warning, but may get one in the coming minutes.

properties.location: around the Tripoint between Austria, Slovakia and Hungary
properties.text: Thunderstorm moving NE in this location, it is 57 dbz+ and has a pretty high lightning activity, it can bring some strong rain and hail is possible with high winds.
properties.source: CESTOF Nowcasting System Nowcaster Direct Upload

properties.text: Thunderstorm moving into Hungary from Austria, it is moving east and has around 52-54 dBZ in radar scans, it can bring winds up to 60km/h, maybe a bit more. Lightning activity is fairly strong.
properties.source: CESTOF Nowcasting System Nowcaster Direct Upload
CESTOF Nowcasting System Nowcaster Direct Upload

properties.text: Strong line of thunderstorm cells are moving into Iasi, Romania, radar scans show strong reflectivity up to dBZ 62, which can be from big hail. Hail probability in the core is very high. Lightning strike activity is fairly low. High winds are also possible.
properties.source: CESTOF Nowcasting System Nowcaster Direct Upload

properties.text: A thunderstorm moving east, it is close to Foscani, radar scans show reflectivity up to 53 dBZ+, it can produce small hail, but the chance is low. Lightning activity fairly low.
properties.source: CESTOF Nowcasting System Nowcaster Direct Upload

properties.text:
Strong thunderstorm with radar scans showing up to 62 dBZ. It can produce hail as it is still intensifying. If it intensifies further a severe tstm warning can be issued.
Few more cells are forming around it.
properties.source: CESTOF Nowcasting System Nowcaster Direct Upload

properties.text: A few thunderstorms are currently around Todi, Marsciano, Orvieto, Italy. They appear to be very slow moving, North-West motion, dBZ scans arent high, only around <50 dBZ, lightning activity is moderate.
properties.source: CESTOF Nowcasting System Nowcaster Direct Upload

properties.text: Few strong thunderstorm cells are forming around Babruysk, Belarus. They can bring hail as some of the scans show over 60 dBZ. Hail is definetly possible and winds are also possible.
properties.source: CESTOF Nowcasting System Nowcaster Direct Upload

properties.text: This strong line of thunderstorm has maintained its strength and is pushing 63+ dBZ in radar scans, a potential bow echo is forming, which can bring very strong winds, so be cautious! Lightning activity is fairly low.
properties.source: CESTOF Nowcasting System Nowcaster Direct Upload
CESTOF Nowcasting System Nowcaster Direct Upload

properties.text: A weakened line of storms is moving into Moldova, the southern part is pushing 60+ dBZ though. lightning activity is low. in the southern part of the storms, hail is possible and even up to 2cm. Wind is also possible.
properties.source: CESTOF Nowcasting System Nowcaster Direct Upload

properties.text: A thunderstorm is located in Montana, Bulgaria. It is moving north-west. It has a low to moderate lightning activity. radar scans are showing 53-55 dBZ
properties.source: CESTOF Nowcasting System Nowcaster Direct Upload

properties.text: A newly formed thunderstorm is moving north-west, into Knezha in Bulgaria. radar scans show 59-61 dBZ, which can be from hail. Hail is definetly possible. Some wind can also happen from this storm. Lightning activity is low to moderate.
properties.source: CESTOF Nowcasting System Nowcaster Direct Upload

properties.text: A couple storm cells are fotming around Isperih, Bulgaria, they are moving north-east. Radar scans show up to 60 dbz, which can be an indication of small hail or heavy rain.
properties.source: CESTOF Nowcasting System Nowcaster Direct Upload

properties.text:
A couple of fairly strong cells are moving North. Pau will be affected by these. Radar scans are pushing up to 62 dBZ+. Lightning activity is moderate.
Hail is possible, and even up to 2-3cm. If they strengthen further, severe warning is going to be issued.
properties.source: CESTOF Nowcasting System Nowcaster Direct Upload

properties.text: A pack of thunderstorms is newely forming and producing lightning strikes. They are moving north and radar scans show around 55 dBZ+. They can strengthen further and produce hail later on. Lightning activity is minor-low-moderate depending on different storm cells.
properties.source: CESTOF Nowcasting System Nowcaster Direct Upload

properties.text: A fairly strong thunderstorm is moving over Bilbao. It has reflectivity up to 58 dBZ, small hail is possible. The cell is moving north and further into Bilbao, soon it is going to cross into the sea. Moderate lightning activity is present.
properties.source: CESTOF Nowcasting System Nowcaster Direct Upload

properties.text: A new thunderstorm has formed close to Buzau, Romania. It has reflectivity up to 60 dBZ, the storm is new, so hail has a low probability to be present. Lightning activity is minor to low.
properties.source: CESTOF Nowcasting System Nowcaster Direct Upload

properties.text:
More cells have formed in the pack of thunderstorms in south France, these particular cells are affecting St. Gaudens. 
Hail is possible, due to the radar scans showing reflectivity up to 60+ dBZ. Lightning activity is low to moderate.
properties.source: CESTOF Nowcasting System Nowcaster Direct Upload

properties.text: A thunderstorm is present close to Besancon, France. It is producing moderate activity of lightning strikes and its reflectivity is around 53 dBZ+. Hail is almost set to zero probability. Movement is North-East.
properties.source: CESTOF Nowcasting System Nowcaster Direct Upload

properties.text: MSLCAL #202, possible TSTORMS
properties.source: CESTOF Nowcasting System Nowcaster Direct Upload

properties.text: A line of storm cells is present in South France, some are fairly strong with 61 dBZ. But some are slowly dying. all of them are moving north, some faster and some slower.
properties.source: CESTOF Nowcasting System Nowcaster Direct Upload

properties.text: Thunderstorm watch has been issued due to many cells forming in this region, lightning activity is predicted.
properties.source: CESTOF Nowcasting System Nowcaster Direct Upload

properties.text: A couple of thunderstorms are heading for Lannion, France. It is a pretty strong couple of storms. Radar scans are showing reflectivity up to 60+ dBZ. Hail is possible. Lightning activity is moderate.
properties.source: CESTOF Nowcasting System Nowcaster Direct Upload

properties.text: A very strong cell has formed out of the couple of storms that have been active in this region, reflectivity is showing up to 67+ dBZ, hail is definetly possible, with bigger hail (>3cm), id say theres a chance too. Be cautious if you are in the path of this!! Lightning activity is low-moderate.
properties.source: CESTOF Nowcasting System Nowcaster Direct Upload

properties.text: A thunderstorm is active over Clermont-Ferrand, reflectivity is around 55 dBZ, which puts a low risk at hail as of now. Lightning activity is moderate. North motion.
properties.source: CESTOF Nowcasting System Nowcaster Direct Upload

properties.text: A thunderstorm is active over Luzeret, France and a few other small villages/cities, it has reflectivity of 55-60 dBZ, which puts a small-medium risk of hail. Lightning activity is low-moderate.
properties.source: CESTOF Nowcasting System Nowcaster Direct Upload

properties.text: A thunderstorm is active over Le Chaux de Fonds in Switzerland, it has reflectivity up to 62 dBZ, which can produce hail. Lightning activity is low.
properties.source: CESTOF Nowcasting System Nowcaster Direct Upload

properties.text: A thunderstorm with 2 cores is active over Schwyz, peak reflectivity is 50 dBZ, so no hail will be present. Lightning activity is pretty active, moderate. It is very slow NE moving.
properties.source: CESTOF Nowcasting System Nowcaster Direct Upload

properties.text: A thunderstorm has formed over Loudeac, France, it is fairly strong in lightning activity, im going to give it moderate activity, highest reflectivity is only 50 dBZ, currently no/very low risk of hail. It is moving north.
properties.source: CESTOF Nowcasting System Nowcaster Direct Upload

properties.text: A very strong thunderstorm is active north of Saint-Girons in France, it has reflectivity up to 65 dBZ, which can be a sign of bigger hail. (up to 3cm or more) Very high risk of hail. Lightning activity is moderate. Movement is: North
properties.source: CESTOF Nowcasting System Nowcaster Direct Upload

properties.text: A thunderstorm is active over Vichy, dbz 61+, hail is possible. Lightning activity is moderate.
